items.content:
Updates

    [/*]

items.title: Hotfix for Game Launch Issues
items.summary: Add more error checking and logging for NVIDIA Streamline Add entries in settings.ini for controlling for NVIDIAStreamlineLog, NVIDIAStreamlineOTAUpdates NVIDIAStreamlineLog=Off ; Values: Off, Default, Verbose NVIDIAStreamlineOTAUpdates=On
items.content:
• Add more error checking and logging for NVIDIA Streamline
  • Add entries in settings.ini for controlling for NVIDIAStreamlineLog, NVIDIAStreamlineOTAUpdates NVIDIAStreamlineLog=Off ; Values: Off, Default, Verbose NVIDIAStreamlineOTAUpdates=On ; Values: Off, On
  • When NVIDIAStreamlineLog enabled, a log file in the Save Game directory will be generated and overwritten every launch. If encountering errors, please submit a support ticket including this log. C:\Users\\Saved Games\God of War Ragnarök\sl.log
  • When disabling NVIDIAStreamlineOTAUpdates, the driver over the air updates will be disabled. If encountering errors, please try disabling.
  • Update the PlayStation Overlay runtime installers to version 4.00

items.title: Black Screen Launch Issue Hotfix
items.summary: An NVIDIA Driver Crash/Soft Lock that prevents the game from loading is under investigation. In the meantime, we've implemented a work around for the cause of the crash to change how shader compilation works. This change may cause some micr
items.content:
An NVIDIA Driver Crash/Soft Lock that prevents the game from loading is under investigation. In the meantime, we've implemented a work around for the cause of the crash to change how shader compilation works. This change may cause some micro-stuttering during initial load, but will hopefully avoid the driver crash that prevents game from starting.

Please verify files after patching.

items.title: God of War 20th Anniversary Avatar & Frame
items.summary: Celebrate the God of War 20th Anniversary with two new items added to the God of War Ragnarök Steam Points Shop ! Animated Avatar Animated Avatar Frame Thank you to all of our fantastic PC players who have embraced God of War, we appreciate
items.content:
Celebrate the God of War 20th Anniversary with two new items added to the God of War Ragnarök Steam Points Shop!

Animated Avatar

Animated Avatar Frame

Thank you to all of our fantastic PC players who have embraced God of War, we appreciate your support and hope you join in the anniversary celebrations with us!

items.title: Patch 9 - 20th Anniversary Update
items.summary: As a gift to everyone who owns God of War Ragnarök, the Dark Odyssey collection is now available in-game at no additional cost! Inspired by the working name of God of War (2005) and the skin that originally appeared in God of War II as a re
items.content:
As a gift to everyone who owns God of War Ragnarök, the Dark Odyssey collection is now available in-game at no additional cost! Inspired by the working name of God of War (2005) and the skin that originally appeared in God of War II as a reward for beating the game on God Mode difficulty, we have brought back the black and gold theme for the anniversary.

Dark Odyssey Collection

Dark Odyssey Armor & Appearance for Kratos
  • Dark Odyssey Kratos Appearance
  • Dark Odyssey Armor Set for Kratos (Dark Odyssey Breastplate, Dark Odyssey Bracers, Dark Odyssey Belt)
Dark Odyssey Companion Armor
  • Dark Odyssey Vestment for Atreus
  • Dark Odyssey Witch Frock for Freya
Dark Odyssey Weapon Appearances & Attachments*
  • Dark Odyssey Leviathan Axe & Dark Odyssey Knob
  • Dark Odyssey Blades of Chaos & Dark Odyssey Handles
  • Dark Odyssey Draupnir Spear & Dark Odyssey Hind
Dark Odyssey Shield Appearances & Rönd
  • Dark Odyssey Guardian Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Dauntless Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Stone Wall Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Shatter Start Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Onslaught Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Spartan Aspis Shield
  • Dark Odyssey Rönd
*Please note, the weapon appearances are made for the fully upgraded version of each weapon and will only be available for use upon reaching that upgrade.

Edit Appearance for Weapon & Shield Attachments

With the addition of the new Dark Odyssey weapon attachments and shield rönd in the patch, we have added the ability to use the ‘Edit Appearance’ feature on those components of Kratos’ arsenal. You’ll be able to pick whatever visual suits your look with the functionality you want for your build!

items.title: Patch 8 Hotfix 3 Released
items.summary: Fixes Added more error checking for corrupt files that may exist and automated file verification if this was discovered (possible fix for booting to black screen issues) Fixed an issue where PSN trophies might not award on loading save if t
items.content:
Fixes

  • Added more error checking for corrupt files that may exist and automated file verification if this was discovered (possible fix for booting to black screen issues)
  • Fixed an issue where PSN trophies might not award on loading save if they were not granted previously
  • Added more error logging for potential graphics card crashes

items.summary: Fixes Added error reporting for startup failures Fixed an issue where game would crash on launch
items.content:
Fixes

  • Added error reporting for startup failures
  • Fixed an issue where game would crash on launch

items.title: Patch 8 Released
items.summary: Updates Edit Appearance Feature changed to no longer require gear to be fully upgraded to level 9 Signing into the PlayStation Network will now be optional on God of War Ragnarök PC For more information on the optional sign-in bonus, please
items.content:
Updates

  • Edit Appearance Feature changed to no longer require gear to be fully upgraded to level 9
  • Signing into the PlayStation Network will now be optional on God of War Ragnarök PC For more information on the optional sign-in bonus, please refer to our news post here.

items.title: Update to Edit Appearance Feature & Armor of the Black Bear Set
items.summary: Tomorrow on January 30th we will be releasing a patch to the PC and PlayStation versions of God of War Ragnarök with a few changes. Update to Edit Appearance Feature (AKA Transmog System) For all PlayStation and PC players, the Edit Appeara
items.content:
Tomorrow on January 30th we will be releasing a patch to the PC and PlayStation versions of God of War Ragnarök with a few changes.

Update to Edit Appearance Feature (AKA Transmog System)

For all PlayStation and PC players, the Edit Appearance feature (AKA the Transmog system), will no longer require gear to be fully upgraded to level 9 and will instead be available from the beginning of the game.

Armor of the Black Bear Set

Updated PS4 & PS5 Access to the Armor of the Black Bear Set

After this update, PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 players will also get access to the Armor of the Black Bear set (no NG+ save required) via the first available Lost Items chest in new and in-progress saves.

PlayStation Network Sign-in Bonus on PC

When signed into an account for the PlayStation Network when playing God of War Ragnarök on PC, you will gain access to the Armor of the Black Bear set for Kratos at the first Lost Items chest in the Realm Between Realms (previously only accessible in a New Game+ run) and a resource bundle. This set includes:
  • Cloak of the Black Bear (Chest)
  • Wraps of the Black Bear (Wrist)
  • Belt of the Black Bear (Waist)
    The resource bundle includes:
  • 500 Hacksilver
  • 250 XP
For in-progress saves, you will be able to access the armor set and resource bundle in the Lost Items chest after the update is live. If you do not wish to log-in to an account for PlayStation Network while playing God of War Ragnarök on PC, you will still be able to access the Armor of the Black Bear set in a New Game+ run (the same as before). Signing into the PlayStation Network will now be optional on God of War Ragnarök PC.

items.title: God of War Ragnarök Wins Best Game on Steam Deck Steam Awards 2024
items.summary: Thank you to our community who voted God of War Ragnarök as the Best Game on Steam Deck at the Steam Awards 2024! At Santa Monica Studio, we are committed to developing unforgettable experiences that inspire our players for years to come. W
items.content: Thank you to our community who voted God of War Ragnarök as the Best Game on Steam Deck at the Steam Awards 2024! At Santa Monica Studio, we are committed to developing unforgettable experiences that inspire our players for years to come. We poured our hearts into the story of Kratos and Atreus' journey, and we are thrilled that it continues to resonate so deeply with players. On behalf of the development team, we want to extend a heartfelt thank you to the Steam community for supporting our game and helping us achieve this award.

items.title: Vote for us at the Steam Awards!
items.summary: God of War Ragnarök PC is up for 'Best Game on Steam Deck' at this year's Steam Awards! Thank you so much to everyone who took the time to nominate us, we're honored to be alongside many fantastic games. Voting is open between now and Dec.
items.content: God of War Ragnarök PC is up for 'Best Game on Steam Deck' at this year's Steam Awards! Thank you so much to everyone who took the time to nominate us, we're honored to be alongside many fantastic games. Voting is open between now and Dec. 31 @ 10 AM PT: store.steampowered.com/steamawards/2024
